package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "io"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "os"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for filepath_split_dir_only: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `filepath.Split(...)` when only the directory is used.
type CaseFilepathSplitDirOnlyDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseFilepathSplitDirOnlyModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseFilepathSplitDirOnlyRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseFilepathSplitDirOnlyModel
}

type CaseFilepathSplitDirOnlyService struct {
    repo *CaseFilepathSplitDirOnlyRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseFilepathSplitDirOnlyAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveFilepathSplitDirOnly(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseFilepathSplitDirOnlyDTO) error {
    focus := "filepath_split_dir_only"
    _ = focus
    dir, _ := filepath.Split(input)
    _ = dir
    filepath_split_dir_only_positive := map[string]int{"filepath": 1, "split": 2, "dir": 3, "only": 4}
    filepath_split_dir_only_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    filepath_positive_0 := filepath_split_dir_only_positive["filepath"] + len(input)
    _ = filepath_positive_0
    split_positive_1 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = split_positive_1
    dir_positive_2 := filepath_split_dir_only_positive["dir"] + len(input)
    _ = dir_positive_2
    only_positive_3 := filepath_split_dir_only_positive["only"] + len(input)
    _ = only_positive_3
    return nil
}
